title: MOSSEL BAY FIRES: Crew to remain, patrol and monitor affected areas - 11 January
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - As of 07:10 today, Sunday,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - As of 07:10 today, Sunday, 11 January, the Mossel Bay wildfire remains contained, said the Garden Route District Municipality (GRDM).","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - As of 07:10 today, Sunday, 11 January, the Mossel Bay wildfire remains contained, said the Garden Route District Municipality (GRDM)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“Firefighting crews from the GRDM attended to minor smouldering hotspots in the Vakansieplaas area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This area is 100% contained, and all remaining pockets of smoke have been extinguished,” said GRDM in its latest statement.","html":"“This area is 100% contained, and all remaining pockets of smoke have been extinguished,” said GRDM in its latest statement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It said the remaining fire lines were patrolled and verified and continue to remain contained. A crew will remain on site today to patrol and monitor the affected areas.","html":"It said the remaining fire lines were patrolled and verified and continue to remain contained. A crew will remain on site today to patrol and monitor the affected areas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193.","html":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: MOSSEL BAY FIRES: Crew to remain, patrol and monitor affected areas - 11 January
